seoTitle: Lewisville ISD Calendar 2026-2027 (LISD): Holidays, Breaks & Important Dates
seoDescription: View Lewisville ISD Calendar 2026-2027 dates including holidays, breaks, early release days, PDF access, and calendar downloads from the Lewisville ISD official calendar PDF.
calendarNotes: Lewisville ISD starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 12, 2026 and lists May 21, 2027 as the fourth nine weeks end, student early release day, and last student day. Families planning childcare, vacations, and school-year schedules can use these dates as the main planning reference for the LISD 2026-2027 school year. Thanksgiving Break runs November 23-27, Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, and Spring Break runs March 15-19. The calendar marks March 29, 2027 as a bad weather day; families should verify whether that date remains available after any weather-related closures.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Lewisville ISD start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Lewisville ISD starts the 2026-2027 school year on Wednesday, August 12, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Lewisville ISD Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 15 through Friday, March 19, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Lewisville ISD Winter Break start?
calendarFaqs.a: Lewisville ISD Winter Break starts Monday, December 21, 2026 and runs through Friday, January 1, 2027. Students return on Tuesday, January 5, 2027 after a staff day on January 4.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Lewisville ISD in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last student day is Friday, May 21, 2027, which is also listed as a student early release day.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Lewisville ISD have early release days in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The official calendar lists December 18, 2026 as a student and staff early release day and May 21, 2027 as a student early release day.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Lewisville ISD release students early?
calendarFaqs.a: Lewisville ISD lists May 21, 2027 as a student early release day. The calendar also lists December 18, 2026 as a student and staff early release day, and families should check the official PDF for campus-level early release times.

calendarFaqs.q: How many instructional days are in the Lewisville ISD 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: The Lewisville ISD 2026-2027 academic calendar lists 174 instructional days, with 84 days in the first semester and 90 days in the second semester.

calendarFaqs.q: How many holidays are in the LISD 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: This page summarizes the major LISD holidays, student holidays, breaks, and no-school dates listed in the 2026-2027 academic calendar. Use the full date table for the exact holiday and no-school day list.

calendarFaqs.q: What is the Lewisville ISD 2026-2027 bad weather day?
calendarFaqs.a: The official calendar marks Monday, March 29, 2027 as a bad weather day.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Lewisville ISD have school on the bad weather day?
calendarFaqs.a: March 29, 2027 is marked as a bad weather day on the official calendar. Families should confirm whether it remains a no-school day after any winter weather closures or emergency schedule changes.

calendarFaqs.q: Can I add the Lewisville ISD calendar to Google Calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. MySchoolDates provides a one-time .ics calendar file generated from the reviewed Lewisville ISD calendar records. It can be imported into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook, but it will not automatically update if LISD revises the official calendar.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Lewisville ISD have school on Friday?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the date table on this page to check scheduled Friday student holidays, breaks, early release dates, and bad weather days. For tomorrow-specific closures or emergency updates, confirm directly with Lewisville ISD and your campus.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Lewisville ISD Thanksgiving Break 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving Break for Lewisville ISD runs Monday, November 23 through Friday, November 27, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Instructional Days
yearNumbers.detail: The calendar lists 84 days in the first semester and 90 days in the second semester.

yearNumbers.label: Student Early Release
yearNumbers.detail: May 21 is listed as the student early release date.

yearNumbers.label: Bad Weather Day
yearNumbers.detail: March 29 is marked as the bad weather day on the official academic calendar.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2025-2026 Calendar
content: Spring Break moves from March 16-20 in 2026 to March 15-19 in 2027.
The last student day moves from May 22 in 2026 to May 21 in 2027.
